All-in-one multi-tenant POS & ERP

Xola gives every tenant a complete point of sale with inventory, staff scheduling, reporting, and delivery-platform integrations — all isolated per business, all reachable from one login.

Features

Everything a tenant needs, in one place.

Multi-tenant control

Run every location or brand from one login, each kept in its own ledger.

Point of sale

Fast checkout on any device, online or offline, with split bills and modifiers.

Inventory & purchasing

Stock counts and supplier orders update the moment something sells.

Staff & scheduling

Shifts, roles, and payroll export, scoped to the right tenant automatically.

Reporting & analytics

One rolled-up view for you, a clean single-tenant view for each owner.

Delivery & payments

Card payments and delivery-platform orders land straight in the same till.

Let's work together to find the right system for your business

Our onboarding specialists help you map your catalog, locations, and staff into Xola before you touch a till, then stay on call 24/7/365 for every tenant you run.

Call now

+977 9851058472

Schedule a call

Simple Setup

Get started in three simple steps

No complex installations or long training hours required. We get your branches live and synced fast.

01

1. Register your account

Sign up in minutes. Configure your brand hierarchy, branches, and staff permissions from one master dashboard.

02

2. Load menu & stock

Import your items, departments, stock levels, and pricing. Custom-tailor menus for different branches if needed.

03

3. Ring up sales

Launch the till on any tablet, phone, or computer. Enjoy fast offline checkouts and automatic real-time sync.

FAQ

Questions we get a lot.

What does multi-tenant mean here?+

Every business you onboard gets its own isolated catalog, staff, and books. You manage them all from one login, but no tenant ever sees another tenant's data.

Can one tenant run several locations?+

Yes — a tenant can hold any number of locations, each with its own till and stock, rolled up into one report for the owner.

Does it work without internet?+

The till keeps ringing up sales offline and syncs everything the moment the connection comes back.

Is there a contract?+

Monthly and yearly plans have no lock-in. The 5-year plan is a one-time payment.

XOLA

Multi-tenant point of sale and ERP for restaurant groups, retail chains, and the platforms that run them.
